shape_semantics: code cmp,vp,vpc,naive = _,W,L,W: value_profile AND naive resolve, value_profile_cmplog BLOCKS, cmplog non-decisive. ANTI-SYNERGY -- adding the I2S stage to value_profile (vpc = both techniques) HURTS: vpc loses to vp-alone and to naive. The verification question for every branch is WHY the extra I2S delta blocks what vp-alone resolves.

hypotheses.label: vpc's I2S substitution pins the corpus to a WRONG decoy literal (sibling case / enumerated case / valid-range boundary), flooding the loser corpus with a value that blocks the target arm

params.decoy_source: the sibling / enumerated-case / boundary literal named in why_loser_doesnt (e.g. MONGOLIAN/NKO tag for 5761, 0x11481 sibling for 6124_h0, the 0x0020/0x00A0/0x2006 case literals for 6263, the GSUB/GPOS table tags for 6162/6210, 0x20 space-class for 5683)
params.target_value: the W-resolving operand named in why_winner_satisfies

hypotheses.prediction: vpc's corpus is ENRICHED for the decoy literal relative to vp (decoy_enrich > 0) while NOT enriched for the target value (signed_target_enrich <= 0). G1-discriminating: pure overhead/throughput drain (the rival hypothesis) predicts NO directional byte-frequency difference between vpc and vp corpora at the gate offset (decoy_enrich ~ 0) -- it slows the loser without steering it to any specific value. G2-independent: it scores corpus BYTE frequencies at the gate offset, not the vpc resolve/block outcome that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP Hamming gradient lands ON the exact 4-byte switch-case codepoint while vpc's added I2S stage diverts mutation onto sibling operands and never closes the last bits to the exact literal -- a closeness gap, not a wrong-value-floods-corpus gap

params.operand_literal: 0x0E36 for 5623 (width 4, LE bytes 36 0e 00 00); 0x1148D for 6124_h0 (width 4, LE bytes 8d 14 01 00 -- the primary winner-seed literal of the 0x1148B/0x1148D case pair)

hypotheses.prediction: value_profile's resolving corpus lands at or essentially at the exact operand (vp_min_distance ~ 0) while value_profile_cmplog's blocking corpus stalls measurably short of it (vpc_min_distance > vp_min_distance, so distance_gap > 0 with vp the closer arm). G1-discriminating: this separates the GRADIENT-CLOSENESS mechanism from the decoy-overcommit mechanism the prior test already tried and FAILED on these two branches -- decoy_overcommit predicts the vpc corpus is byte-enriched at the gate offset for a NAMED wrong literal (decoy_enrich high); the closeness mechanism instead predicts vpc simply ratchets LESS CLOSE to the target literal (no specific decoy needs to dominate, only that vpc's nearest-window Hamming distance to the exact operand stays larger than vp's). It also rules out pure overhead-drain, which predicts NO closeness gap (vpc would reach the literal just as near, only slower). G2-independent: it measures the minimum Hamming distance from corpus windows to the gate operand, computed from saved seed bytes -- never the vpc resolve/block label that defined the shape.
hypotheses.rule: winner_closer == true AND distance_gap > 0.15 AND vp_min_distance < 0.1

hypotheses.label: vpc's I2S substitution pulls the loser corpus toward shallow / degenerate inputs that never DRIVE THE CALL CHAIN to the deep shaping context where the gate is dispatched; vp's gradient-grown corpus reaches that context far more per seed, so the gate is reachable to vp and structurally out-of-reach to vpc -- a context-REACH shortfall, not a value-match or closeness shortfall

params.branch_line: the gate line per branch: hb-ot-shape-fallback.cc:51 (switch dispatch) for 5623; hb-ot-shaper-vowel-constraints.cc:409 (switch dispatch) for 6124_h0
params.note: depth_lift / winner_depth / loser_depth measure per-seed-normalized executions of the gate LINE (reaching the dispatch context AT ALL, independent of which case or which side is taken). side_lift is deliberately NOT used here -- the blocked-side count IS the resolve/block outcome (G2-coupled).

hypotheses.prediction: vp's resolving seeds execute the gate-line context substantially more per seed than vpc's blocking seeds (winner_deeper == true AND depth_lift >= 1.5), i.e. vpc-blocking seeds rarely even reach the switch dispatch context. G1-discriminating: the two PRIOR mechanisms already tried-and-failed on 5623/6124_h0 BOTH assume vpc REACHES the gate context and only mis-values it -- decoy_overcommit predicts vpc reaches the switch and lands on a SIBLING case (equal context reach, wrong case -> winner_deeper FALSE), and gradient-closeness predicts vpc reaches the switch and gets NEAR but not exact (also equal context reach -> winner_deeper FALSE). Pure overhead-drain likewise predicts vpc reaches the gate just as deeply, only slower in wall-clock (winner_deeper FALSE). Only the context-REACH mechanism predicts vpc's corpus is structurally shallower at the gate line (winner_deeper TRUE). G2-independent: it scores per-seed executions of the gate LINE from a clean cov run, never the True/False side or the vpc resolve/block label that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's gradient grows a LARGER, more structurally-rich glyph-record corpus (multi-consonant + joiner Indic syllable) than vpc; the added I2S substitution stage swaps whole operands and truncates/degenerates the loser's records, so vpc's blocking corpus carries FEWER structural glyph-record tokens and shorter seeds -- a structural-assembly SIZE/TOKEN shortfall in the static corpus, NOT a single-operand value match nor a per-seed execution-depth gap

params.tokens: the recurring little-endian Indic glyph-record dwords named in the analysis (0c 20 00 00, 09 00 00, 47 0c 00 00) plus 0xa4 glyph-byte runs -- the structural records set_indic_properties classifies into the consonant+joiner stream the line-937 do-while needs
params.size_lift_orientation: size_lift = median(value_profile resolving seed size) / median(value_profile_cmplog blocking seed size); >1 means vp seeds are larger (loser seeds are 'shorter, joiner-poor records' per the analysis)
params.note: joint_necessity's canonical orientation compares vpc-resolving vs cmplog/vp-blocking for the PRO joint subtype; here the polarity is inverted (vp resolves, vpc blocks), so the arbiter reads vp_tags as the WINNER token count and vpc_tags as the LOSER token count, and size_lift as winner/loser. The mechanism is the same structural-assembly measurement, just anti-polarity.

hypotheses.prediction: value_profile's resolving corpus carries substantially MORE structural glyph-record tokens and LARGER seeds than value_profile_cmplog's blocking corpus (vp_tags >> vpc_tags, i.e. tag_lift >= 1.5 AND size_lift >= 1.3). G1-discriminating: 5865 is a dispersed_multibyte / state_or_grammar gate with NO single fixed-offset operand, so neither decoy_overcommit (operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature -- there is no decoy literal at a fixed offset) nor gradient-closeness (value_distance_reached has no operand_literal by construction) can fire; and the prior depth_reach context-reach test was SCORED on 5865 and did NOT hold (winner_deeper false / depth_lift < 1.5 -- vpc's blocking seeds reach the do-while loop line about as often per seed as vp's, so the shortfall is NOT one of execution reach). This hypothesis asserts a genuinely different thing: the difference is in the STATIC STRUCTURAL CONTENT of the corpus (how many well-formed glyph-records each arm's seeds carry and how large they are), not where the seeds execute. If vpc's blocking corpus carries as many structural glyph-record tokens and is as large as vp's (tag_lift ~ 1 OR size_lift ~ 1), the hypothesis is FALSIFIED and 5865 falls through to fallback. An alternative -- pure overhead-drain -- predicts NO structural-token difference (vpc explores the same record structures, just slower), which this rule also rules out. G2-independent: it counts structural glyph-record tokens and median seed size in the saved corpus, never the do-while True/False side or the vpc resolve/block label that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: I2S substitution steers the vpc loser corpus toward valid ICC headers whose version major byte stays <= 0x09 (the decoy small-version value), DEPLETING the >0x09 target arm -- a clean fixed-offset (offset 0x08) single-byte inequality decoy gate, the anti/depletion polarity of decoy_overcommit_wrong_literal

params.decoy_source: valid small-version bytes <= 0x09 (e.g. 0x03) at offset 0x08 -- the value I2S splices in from the logged valid 'lcms'-magic header
params.target_value: any byte > 0x09 at offset 0x08 (e.g. 0x0a, 0x29) that trips the *pByte > 0x09 branch

hypotheses.prediction: vpc's corpus is ENRICHED for the valid small-version decoy byte (<=0x09) at offset 0x08 relative to vp (decoy_enrich > 0) while DEPLETED for the >0x09 target value (signed_target_enrich < 0). G1-discriminating: pure overhead-drain predicts NO directional byte-frequency difference at offset 0x08 (decoy_enrich ~ 0) -- it would slow vpc without pinning the version byte to a valid small value. The >0x09 vs <=0x09 split is a magnitude (inequality) distinction over the offset-0x08 byte, not a single-byte equality coincidence, so the width-1 chance-alignment caveat does not apply. G2-independent: it scores corpus byte frequencies at the fixed gate offset, not the vpc resolve/block outcome that defined the shape.
hypotheses.note: lcms is an sB-owned target; on s4 it has no on-disk corpus and the branch is flagged seed_starved (W=2, L=24; rank-10 re-bisect candidate). Per the cross-server rule it is NOT marked decidable:false -- the mechanism IS genuinely discriminable with operand_enrichment (a clean fixed-offset decoy gate), so the owning server arbitrates after re-bisecting >=3 W seeds. Prior round placed this in a corpus_coverage_gap block with NO scored rule, which is why it stayed rule_not_met; it is now a first-class hypothesis with a rule so the owning server can score it.

non_discriminable.label: non-literal / derived-relation gate: I2S has no input-byte literal to substitute, so vpc pays pure CmpLog per-exec overhead and loses on throughput -- no value-level signature to measure, no structural token to count, and the gate line collapses onto the resolve/block side so depth_reach cannot separate it either
non_discriminable.why_non_discriminable: bloaty_301 (start>=end pointer-arithmetic relation, none_structural) and libpng_4072_h1 (derived idat_size length field) have NO fixed-offset input literal for I2S to substitute toward, so operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature and value_distance_reached has no operand by construction. They also have no recurring structural-record token to count (the new joint_necessity/struct_size_and_token_count pivot needs a target-specific structural token vocabulary -- font glyph-record dwords for 5865 -- which a sign-only numeric token / a single length field do not provide), so the structural-assembly test cannot fire either. depth_reach ALSO fails to discriminate them: in both cases the gate line IS an inequality/relation that BOTH arms reach and evaluate every iteration (bloaty: W T=6 F=0, L T=0 F=12 -- both hit line 659; libpng: line 4245 is re-evaluated each IDAT-loop iteration), so the only difference is which SIDE is taken -- and the blocked-side count is exactly the resolve/block outcome that defined the shape (G2 violation). depth_lift on the gate line is ~1 (equal context reach), so winner_deeper carries no mechanism information here. The only remaining built candidate is global corpus-scale scheduling (corpus_size_ratio vpc vs vp), a per-trial quantity confounded by every other branch and by raw exec count -- it cannot attribute a per-branch block to the I2S delta, and an inflated corpus is equally consistent with benign exploration. data_realities: I2S is untagged in mutation_op and value_profile is a feedback, so NO seed_lineage 'I2S-overhead event' is measurable. G3 honest fallback: inconclusive.

data_realities_respected: on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 -> the decoy, closeness, context-reach, and structural-assembly tests score ONLY the harfbuzz branches on s4; bloaty_301, lcms_2137, libpng_4072_h1 have no corpus on s4 and route to their owning server (sB) or fallback.

operand_enrichment needs a fixed-offset VALUE gate (skips structural/length) and >=3 W and >=3 L seeds; value_distance_reached needs one operand_literal and on-disk seeds, and flags width<=2 chance-alignment (both closeness operands are width 4, safe).

depth_reach needs the target's cov image and >=3 W / >=3 L seeds; it is applied ONLY to switch-dispatch / loop-exit gate lines where reaching the line is separable from the resolved side -- NOT to bloaty/libpng inequality/derived gates (gate line == resolve side -> G2-coupled).

joint_necessity/struct_size_and_token_count needs a target-specific structural-token vocabulary (--tokens) and on-disk seeds; harfbuzz has its corpus + the Indic glyph-record dwords are a concrete structural token set, so the structural-assembly test runs for 5865 on s4. It is NOT applied to bloaty/libpng (no recurring structural-record token in a sign-only numeric / single length-field gate).
I2S and value_profile are both invisible in mutation_op (no lineage event) -- no overhead-drain hypothesis is given a lineage descriptor; the non-literal gates fall to decidable:false honestly.

lcms_2137 is NOT marked decidable:false despite seed-starvation/corpus absence on s4 -- it is an sB target with a genuinely discriminable fixed-offset decoy gate (offset 0x08, >0x09 magnitude split); the owning server arbitrates after re-bisecting (cross-server rule).
notes: ROUND-3 (FINAL) RE-DESIGN, loop-until-dry. KEPT VERBATIM (frozen superset -- the 8 confirmed branches re-validate; no relaxed-threshold re-test of any): (1) decoy_overcommit_wrong_literal (operand_enrichment), (2) vp_gradient_reaches_exact_literal_i2s_stalls_short (value_distance_reached), (3) vpc_corpus_shallower_context_reach (depth_reach). NOTE: vpc_corpus_shallower_context_reach is kept but its applies_to_branches no longer lists 5865 -- 5865 was SCORED under depth_reach last round and the rule did NOT hold (it is the rule_not_met branch this round), so depth_reach is exhausted for 5865 and a relaxed re-test is forbidden; 5623/6124_h0 remain in it as the confirmed/carried-forward members. NEW MECHANISMS this round for the 4 still-unlabeled rule_not_met branches: (a) vp_assembles_larger_structured_glyph_stream_i2s_truncates for harfbuzz_5865 -- the previously-UNTRIED joint_necessity/struct_size_and_token_count tool, measuring the STATIC STRUCTURAL content (glyph-record token count + median seed size) of the winner vs loser corpus. This is genuinely different from all three priors: decoy/closeness need a single fixed-offset operand 5865 lacks (dispersed_multibyte), and depth_reach (per-seed EXECUTION reach of the loop line) was scored-and-failed -- the new test asks instead whether vp's corpus simply CARRIES MORE assembled glyph-record structure than vpc's truncated/degenerate records (tag_lift >= 1.5 AND size_lift >= 1.3), falsifiable if vpc's blocking corpus is equally large/structured. (b) lcms_version_byte_decoy_depletion for lcms_2137 -- promoted from last round's corpus_coverage_gap (which had no scored rule, hence rule_not_met) to a first-class operand_enrichment hypothesis with a decision rule, anti/depletion polarity at the fixed offset-0x08 >0x09 inequality gate; decidable=deferred_to_owning_server (sB owns lcms; re-bisect >=3 W seeds, then score). STILL decidable:false (G3 honest inconclusive): bloaty_301 (start>=end pointer relation) and libpng_4072_h1 (derived idat_size length gate) -- neither has a fixed-offset literal (operand_enrichment/value_distance_reached N/A), nor a recurring structural-record token (joint_necessity N/A), nor a context-reach signal separable from the resolve side (depth_reach G2-coupled: gate line == resolve side, depth_lift~1); only a confounded global corpus_size_ratio remains, which cannot attribute a per-branch block to the I2S delta. These two non-literal/derived overhead-drain gates are a legitimately non-discriminable family -- an honest inconclusive is the correct outcome. G2 throughout: every test scores corpus byte frequencies / corpus-window Hamming distances / structural-token counts+seed size / per-seed gate-line reach, independent of the vpc resolve pattern that defined the shape.
